name: python3-wadllib
title: python3-wadllib
summary: Python 3 library for navigating WADL files
description:
Python 3 library for navigating WADL files
The Web Application Description Language (WADL) is an XML vocabulary for
describing the capabilities of HTTP resources. wadllib can be used in
conjunction with an HTTP library to navigate and manipulate those resources.
.
This package provides wadllib for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-wadllib because Python 3 library for navigating WADL files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-wadllib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-wadllib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-wadllib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
